simple_types.name: Real_Time_Counter
simple_types.code: type Real_Time_Counter (Periph : not null access NRF_SVD.RTC.RTC_Peripheral) is private;

simple_types.name: RTC_Events
simple_types.code:
type RTC_Events is (Tick_Event, Overflow_Event, Compare_0_Event,
                   Compare_1_Event, Compare_2_Event, Compare_3_Event);

subprograms.name: Event
subprograms.code:
function Event (This : Real_Time_Counter;
                Evt  : RTC_Events) return Event_Type

subprograms.name: Set_Compare
